summary: A Go-based modular testing framework that detects conditions, runs assertions, and generates reports with Kubernetes integration and plugin support.
concerns: automated session metadata commits cluttering git history
uncommitted working directory changes (1 modified, 1 staged, 3 untracked)
potential over-reliance on AI agent auto-commits
missing key implementation files in hot files (only tests visible)
suggestions: disable or filter auto-commit session metadata from main branch history
commit or stash the current working directory changes
add implementation files (detector.go, schema.go, reporter.go) to key files review
establish a clear branching strategy to isolate agent tracking commits
